narrative:
Precinct Vermilion City 3-A/5-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,254 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
